zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Kirkpatrick 17th Laird of Closeburne於1603年出生在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾可洛本時，他的父親Sir James Thomas Kirkpatrick23歲，母親Dame Agnes Charteris of Amisfield22歲。他於大約1630年與Dame Grizel Baillie結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1668年享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert Kirkpatrick 17th Laird of Closeburne于1603年出生在英国苏格兰度福利爾可洛本时，他的父亲Sir James Thomas Kirkpatrick23岁，母亲Dame Agnes Charteris of Amisfield22岁。他于大约1630年与Dame Grizel Baillie结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1668年享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Kirkpatrick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from either of two places in Dumfriess called Kirkpatrick or any of various other places in Scotland, all so named from the dedication of their church to Saint Patrick. The Scottish word kirk sometimes replaced Gaelic cill ‘church’ in placenames; compare Kilpatrick .

variants.name: Kilpatrick
meanings: Irish (Ulster): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Phádraig ‘son of the servant of (Saint) Patrick’ (Irish Pádraig). See also Fitzpatrick .
Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called in Gaelic as cill Padraig ‘church of (Saint) Patrick’. See also Kirkpatrick .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Kirkpatrick 17th Laird of Closeburne was born in 1603, in Closeburn, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir James Thomas Kirkpatrick, was 23 and his mother, Dame Agnes Charteris of Amisfield, was 22. He married Dame Grizel Baillie about 1630. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died about 1668, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Kirkpatrick 17th Laird of Closeburne est né en 1603, à Closeburn, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir James Thomas Kirkpatrick, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Dame Agnes Charteris of Amisfield, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Dame Grizel Baillie environ 1630. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1668, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Kirkpatrick 17th Laird of Closeburne 1603 in Closeburn, Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir James Thomas Kirkpatrick 23 und seine Mutter Dame Agnes Charteris of Amisfield 22. Er hat um 1630 Dame Grizel Baillie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1668 im Alter von 66 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Kirkpatrick 17th Laird of Closeburne è nato il nel 1603 nel Closeburn, Dumfriesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir James Thomas Kirkpatrick, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Dame Agnes Charteris of Amisfield, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Dame Grizel Baillie circa 1630. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1668, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Kirkpatrick 17th Laird of Closeburneが1603年にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアクロセブルンで生まれた時，父Sir James Thomas Kirkpatrickは23歳，母Dame Agnes Charteris of Amisfieldは22歳であった。約1630年にDame Grizel Baillieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1668年に66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Kirkpatrick 17th Laird of Closeburne(이)가 1603년 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르 클로세번에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir James Thomas Kirkpatrick(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Dame Agnes Charteris of Amisfield(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1630년 Dame Grizel Baillie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1668년 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Kirkpatrick 17th Laird of Closeburne nasceu em 1603, em Closeburn, Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir James Thomas Kirkpatrick, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Dame Agnes Charteris of Amisfield, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Dame Grizel Baillie aproximadamente 1630. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1668, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Kirkpatrick 17th Laird of Closeburne родился в 1603 г. в местности клосебурн, думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir James Thomas Kirkpatrick было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Dame Agnes Charteris of Amisfield, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Dame Grizel Baillie около 1630 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1668 г. в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert Kirkpatrick 17th Laird of Closeburne nació en 1603, en Closeburn, Dumfriesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir James Thomas Kirkpatrick, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Dame Agnes Charteris of Amisfield, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Dame Grizel Baillie aproximadamente 1630. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1668, a la edad de 66 años.
